text:
Hi there,

I saw that on the support page there are no vendors listed in Africa.

I am a freelance IT support engineer located in South Africa and would like to add my name to the list.

My contact details:
    Ross Cameron (sole proprietor of Prometheus Consulting)
    eMail: rwd.cameron@consultant.com
    Mobile: +27 (0)73 958-3074

Is there anything else you need to know?

Regards,
Ross Cameron
